ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings, credit card) */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "routing_number" TEXT /* Routing number for the account */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank where the account is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account involved in the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "from_party" TEXT /* Party who initiated the transaction */,
  "to_party" TEXT /* Party who received the transaction */,
  "narrative" TEXT /* Narrative or description of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the budget is for */,
  "budget_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated for the budget */,
  "budget_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the budget (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., low balance, bill due) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message included in the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., owner, viewer, editor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access grant */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user granted access */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_access_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the currency (e.g., $, €, £) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_categories" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id", "category_id")
)
